characters.appearance: 2D cartoon man with a perfectly round head, tan skin, simple dot eyes, and a single line for a mouth. He has stick-figure arms and legs.
characters.wardrobe: Plain white t-shirt and black pants.
characters.demeanor: Initially confused and hesitant, later becomes enthusiastic and convinced.

characters.appearance: 3D rendering of a female humanoid robot. She has a white and silver metallic body with glowing blue accents, notably a circular light on her chest and bright blue eyes. Her face is sculpted to look human-like but metallic.
characters.wardrobe: Built-in white and silver metallic plating.
characters.demeanor: Helpful, reassuring, and robotic but friendly.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: अगर आप ये video समझ रहे हैं, [If you are understanding this video,]
Character A says: तो आपकी English already अच्छी है! [then your English is already good!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by validating their existing English comprehension.
- Sets up the premise that understanding isn't the problem, speaking is.
- Establishes a relatable, encouraging tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: अगर आप ये video समझ रहे हैं, तो आपकी English already अच्छी है! Supernova

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: अरे, क्या कर रहे हो? [Hey, what are you doing?]
Character A says: I burn candle. [I burn candle.]
Character B says: "I'm lighting a candle" बोलना चाहिए! [You should say "I'm lighting a candle"!]
Character B says: English बोलने में डर लगता है क्या? [Are you scared of speaking English?]
Character A says: हाँ यार... grammar में अटक जाता हूँ। [Yes friend... I get stuck in grammar.]
Character B says: Tension मत लो! [Don't take tension!]
Character B says: Supernova के AI tutor के साथ रोज़ practice करो। [Practice daily with Supernova's AI tutor.]
Character B says: Interview हो या office, confidence आ जाएगा। [Whether it's an interview or office, confidence will come.]
Character A says: AI? पर मेरे पास expensive classes के पैसे नहीं हैं... [AI? But I don't have money for expensive classes...]
Character B says: अरे, Supernova बहुत affordable है! [Hey, Supernova is very affordable!]
Character B says: महँगे courses की कोई ज़रूरत नहीं। [No need for expensive courses.]
Character B says: रोज़ अपने phone पर बोलकर practice करो। [Practice speaking daily on your phone.]
Character A says: सच में? [Really?]
Character B says: बिल्कुल! [Absolutely!]
Character B says: एकदम real-life situations वाली practice. [Exactly real-life situations practice.]
Character B says: Customer से बात करना हो या boss से। [Whether talking to a customer or a boss.]
Character A says: जैसे... कोई असली tutor हो? [Like... having a real tutor?]
Character B says: हाँ, जो तुम्हारी grammar और pronunciation ठीक करे, [Yes, who corrects your grammar and pronunciation,]
Character B says: बिना तुम्हें judge किए! [without judging you!]
Character A says: सही है... मैं अभी Supernova download करता हूँ। [That's great... I'll download Supernova right now.]
Character B says: बहुत बढ़िया decision! [Great decision!]
Character B says: चलो, आज से ही English बोलना शुरू करें। [Come on, let's start speaking English from today itself.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates a common speaking mistake and provides gentle correction.
- Introduces Supernova's AI tutor as a practical, affordable solution for real-world scenarios (office/interviews).
- Overcomes price objections by positioning the app as an affordable alternative to expensive courses.
- Highlights the non-judgmental nature of AI feedback.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: अरे, क्या कर रहे हो? I burn candle. "I'm lighting a candle" बोलना चाहिए! English बोलने में डर लगता है क्या? हाँ यार... grammar में अटक जाता हूँ। Tension मत लो! Supernova के AI tutor के साथ रोज़ practice करो। Interview हो या office, confidence आ जाएगा। AI? पर मेरे पास expensive classes के पैसे नहीं हैं... अरे, Supernova बहुत affordable है! महँगे courses की कोई ज़रूरत नहीं। रोज़ अपने phone पर बोलकर practice करो। सच में? बिल्कुल! एकदम real-life situations वाली practice. Customer से बात करना हो या boss से। जैसे... कोई असली tutor हो? हाँ, जो तुम्हारी grammar और pronunciation ठीक करे, बिना तुम्हें judge किए! सही है... मैं अभी Supernova download करता हूँ। बहुत बढ़िया decision! चलो, आज से ही English बोलना शुरू करें।

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: आज ही Supernova app download करें! [Download the Supernova app today!]
Unknown speaker says: और confidence से English बोलें! [And speak English with confidence!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear, direct call to action.
- Reinforces the core brand promise of speaking English with confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: आज ही Supernova app download करें! और confidence से English बोलें! Supernova
